# CWE-59 negative: reject symlinks before read (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-59-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

// CWE-59 Improper Link Resolution Before File Access (mitigated)
func DeliverAttachment(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	staging := "/var/staging"
	name := r.FormValue("filename")
	path := filepath.Join(staging, filepath.Base(name))
	info, err := os.Lstat(path)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	if info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 {
		http.Error(w, "link", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	file, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	defer file.Close()
	data, err := io.ReadAll(file)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "read", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(data)
}
